title: Manage workplace health and safety processes
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage workplace health and safety processes demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Review and develop workplace health and safety policies and procedures

pcs.text: Review current workplace health and safety management plan and program, if applicable
